title: Forgotten Beasts
body:
This Minecraft D&D mod is perfect for players who want to add more mythical creatures to their game. With this mod, you can encounter a variety of beasts, including owlbears and griffons. These creatures are not only visually stunning, but they also add a new level of excitement and challenge to your gameplay

 

The mod allows players to explore new areas and encounter unique creatures that they wouldn't normally find in the vanilla Minecraft game. With the addition of these mythical beasts, players can create their own D&D-style adventures, where they must face off against dangerous creatures to complete quests and earn rewards

 

Whether you're a seasoned Minecraft player or new to the game, this mod is sure to provide you with hours of fun and adventure. So why not give it a try and see what mythical beasts you can discover in your Minecraft world?

 

Requires Forgotten Mobs and Geckolib 1.19 - 3.1.40

Requires https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dnd-forgotten-mobs
